sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73313" key="o)lofrone/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλοφρονέω</orth>, for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ὀλοοφρονέω</foreign> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀλοόφρων</foreign>) <sense id="n73313.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be crafty, deceitful, Wiener Sitzb.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0477.tlg001:132(2).24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">132(2).24</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Caria</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
